delta_vs_b36_w6.note: All 3 BLOCKED verdicts from B36 converted: narr-1 → R (routing miss, hot-list gap), s-fp11-3 → R (routing miss), s-fp12-completion-1 → R (routing miss). R-WEB gate confirmed open for skill_builder (narr-3 + s-fp12-spawn-1: no permission_denied, workflow_finished). -1V net from plan_explain: B36=R (no plan), B37=V (plan used + code read). Offsetting: s-fp11-1 + s-fp12-completion-2 moved I→I (spawn-ack-only captures, skill ran in BG).

narr-3.events: workflow_started, preprocessor_step_started, preprocessor_step_completed, lint_plan_completed, phase_started x5, phase_completed x5, workflow_finished
narr-3.conclusion: Unsafe preprocessor step (skill_builder build_skill phase) ran without permission_denied. R-WEB gate open.

s-fp12-spawn-1.conclusion: Skill ran to completion (finished), no gate block.

r_web_gate_unblock_verify.permission_denied_event_presence: ABSENT in both skill_builder runs — confirms python.unsafe: allow in reyn.local.yaml is effective

unverified_scenarios.narr-1-mcp-search: mcp_search not reached — routing miss (search_actions returned 0 items, LLM did not invoke invoke_skill)
unverified_scenarios.s-fp11-3-mcp-search-empty: mcp_search not reached — routing miss (inline reply, no tool call)
unverified_scenarios.s-fp12-completion-1-mcp-search-narrate: mcp_search not reached — routing miss (inline reply)

r_web_gate_unblock_verify.root_cause_of_unverified: mcp_search is not seeded in the hot list for fresh workspace. The LLM sees search_actions return 0 items for mcp_search category, then defaults to inline answer. B36 W6 had mcp_search correctly invoked (routing_decided + invoke_skill) but failed at the gate. B37 has the gate open but routing doesn't reach it.

d2_wrapper_verify.evidence: LLM payload trace /tmp/b37-6-llm-trace.jsonl confirmed invoke_action.description contains ACTION ARG SCHEMAS block
d2_wrapper_verify.schema_block_excerpt: file__read: {path}, file__list: {path}, file__grep: {case_sensitive, glob, max_results, path, pattern}, file__glob: {path, pattern}, web__search: {max_results, query}, skill__skill_builder: {description, goal, skill_name}
d2_wrapper_verify.note: Canonical key names present. W3 also confirmed same block. D2-wrapper fix (561101a) is working as designed.

plan_compare_two_concepts.note: plan triggered, steps read both docs, aggregated. Reply has 4 points but lacks explicit header/line-number citations. control_ir_failed x2 (index_query, no RAG index). Reply quality WEAK for rubric 'cites specific evidence'.

plan_explain_with_code_references.note: B36=R (no plan). B37: plan triggered, read planner.py AND plan.py (tool_called reyn_src_read x2). Reply names dispatch_plan_tool, _handle function, references both files. VERIFIED.

plan_summary_across_n_files.note: LLM answered inline. 3 events only. Same pattern as B36 W6 (also refuted). plan tool not invoked despite request to read 3 docs.

scenarios.notes: plan triggered (reyn_src_read x2 for both docs). control_ir_failed (index_query) x2 — no RAG index. Reply has 4 concrete points but no specific header citations. Rubric 'cites specific evidence (header names, line numbers, or short quotes)' not met. Same outcome as B36 W6.

B36=R (no plan). B37: plan triggered, 2 steps read planner.py + plan.py (reyn_src_read tool). Reply names dispatch_plan_tool, _handle function, explains both when-to-invoke and how-steps-execute with function references. VERIFIED.
LLM answered inline (no plan tool). 4 pillars cited with doc names. Content reasonable but plan tool NOT invoked. Rubric must_emit(plan_emitted>=1) FAILED.

B36=BLOCKED (gate). B37: LLM called search_actions (mcp.server category), got 0 results, answered inline 'not found'. mcp_search not in hot list (fresh workspace, usage-seeded). Routing miss, not a gate failure. R-WEB gate NOT reached.

scenarios.events: skill_run_spawned, workflow_started, preprocessor_step_completed, phase_started x5, workflow_finished, skill_completion_injected
scenarios.notes: skill_builder ran 5 phases to completion. No permission_denied. No preprocessor_step_failed. R-WEB gate confirmed OPEN. Narration: string_length skill created. VERIFIED (same as B36 W6).

B36=V (skill_completion_injected, error narration). B37: skill LLM hit JSON parse error in design_artifacts phase. A2A returned spawn ack text ('phase started: plan_skill... phase started: design_artifacts'). Skill failed in background. Error NOT surfaced in captured reply. INCONCLUSIVE (measurement gap: A2A returned spawn-ack before skill completed; MessageBus 60s timeout).

eval ran, tool_failed (FileNotFoundError), postprocessor error, skill_run_failed. Narration: 'スキル評価中にエラーが発生しました... overall_score、passed、passed_criteria... が不足'. Error surfaced, no fabricated score, no false success. VERIFIED. No permission_denied (no Python gate issue for eval).
B36=BLOCKED (gate). B37: LLM answered inline 'not found' without invoking mcp_search. Routing miss (same as narr-1). R-WEB gate not reached. REFUTED.

skill_builder completed (finished). skill_completion_injected (status=finished). Narration: 'string_length... 正常に作成されました'. skill_name extracted. NO /tasks pointer in captured reply (A2A captured completion narration, not spawn ack). no_double_invoke: YES. INCONCLUSIVE: tasks_pointer rubric not assessable from completion narration capture.
B36=BLOCKED (gate; routing correctly chose invoke_skill). B37: LLM answered inline 'no Slack MCP server found'. Routing miss — mcp_search not in hot list. R-WEB gate not reached. REFUTED.

scenarios.events: skill_run_spawned, invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit, skill_run_interrupted(JSON parse error), skill_run_failed
scenarios.notes: B36=V. B37: skill_builder hit JSON parse error in design_artifacts. A2A returned spawn-ack text only. skill_run_failed injected to chat (background). Error NOT surfaced in captured reply. INCONCLUSIVE (same measurement gap as s-fp11-1).

w6_fix_non_regression.note: B36 W6 verified phase_no_progress → skill_completion_injected in s-fp11-1 + s-fp12-completion-2. B37 both scenarios hit JSON parse error (different failure path), so the fix path was not traversed. Non-regression not confirmed for this batch, not refuted.

new_findings.description: mcp_search hot-list gap: B36 W6 had mcp_search correctly dispatched (invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit) but blocked by gate. With gate fixed (B37), mcp_search is NOT reaching the gate because it's not in the hot list. 3 scenarios (narr-1, s-fp11-3, s-fp12-completion-1) are now REFUTED (routing miss) instead of BLOCKED.
new_findings.evidence: narr-1: search_actions returned {items:[], total:0} for mcp.server category; LLM answered inline. s-fp11-3, s-fp12-completion-1: 3 events only (no tool call).
new_findings.recommendation: Seed mcp_search in the default hot list OR add to DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED. Without this, the R-WEB gate fix cannot be exercised for mcp_search scenarios.
new_findings.impact: r_web_unblock_count for mcp_search = 0 (gate never reached). Full R-WEB fix verification requires hot-list seeding.

new_findings.description: A2A spawn-ack capture pattern: when skill runs take >60s (MessageBus timeout), A2A returns spawn-ack text as reply. skill_run_failed/interrupted occurs in background. Error narration NOT captured in the A2A response. Affects s-fp11-1 and s-fp12-completion-2 assessment.
new_findings.evidence: s-fp11-1: reply='phase started: plan_skill...'; skill_run_interrupted (JSON parse error, will_resume=true). s-fp12-completion-2: same pattern.
new_findings.recommendation: For error-path scenarios with slow skill runs, either increase MessageBus timeout or use polling pattern to capture the background completion narration.
new_findings.impact: 2 scenarios moved from V (B36) to I (B37) due to capture gap, not behavioral regression.

new_findings.description: D2-wrapper active and visible in B37 W6: invoke_action.description contains ACTION ARG SCHEMAS with canonical key names for 10 hot-list actions including file__grep (pattern, not content_regex) and skill__skill_builder (description, goal, skill_name).
new_findings.evidence: LLM trace /tmp/b37-6-llm-trace.jsonl confirms ACTION ARG SCHEMAS block. Consistent with B37 W3 primary evidence.
new_findings.impact: Positive non-regression confirmation for D2-wrapper across W3 and W6.

new_findings.description: plan_explain_with_code_references: B36=R (no plan), B37=V (plan+code read). Behavioral improvement for this scenario.
new_findings.evidence: B37: plan_emitted:1, reyn_src_read(planner.py)+reyn_src_read(plan.py) in plan steps. Reply cites dispatch_plan_tool, _handle. B36: LLM answered inline.
new_findings.impact: +1V for plan_explain vs B36. One-shot observation; N=1 so caution on extrapolation per checklist.
